scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/css dist/js dist/images && cp index.html admin.html login.html dist/ && cp css/*.css dist/css/ && cp js/*.js dist/js/ && cp images/* dist/images/
scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name diamond-banquet-hall
